category_sources: Official project site and repository describe vramsteg as a CLI progress bar tool.
source_facts.description says vramsteg adds progress bars to command-line applications.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage uses the vramsteg project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Gothenburg Bit Factory project page for vramsteg.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated in the input, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it adds progress bars to command-line applications.
source_facts.executables lists the vramsteg CLI executable.
